nodes.author: Maharshi Parasara

nodes.label: Mercury (Budha)
nodes.author: Maharshi Parasara
nodes.description: Attractive physique, ability to make pun, sense of humour, blend of all three humours

nodes.label: Jupiter (Guru/Brihaspati)
nodes.author: Maharshi Parasara
nodes.description: Large bodied, honey coloured eyes and hair, phlegmatic, intelligent, learned in all Shastras

nodes.label: Venus (Shukra)
nodes.author: Maharshi Parasara
nodes.description: Joyful, charming physique, beautiful brilliant eyes, poet, phlegmatic and windy, curly hair

nodes.label: Saturn (Shani)
nodes.author: Maharshi Parasara
nodes.description: Emaciated and long physique, honey coloured eyes, windy, big teeth, indolent, lame, coarse hair

nodes.label: Rahu (North Node)
nodes.author: Maharshi Parasara
nodes.description: Smoke-like blue body, lives in forests, horrible, windy temperament, intelligent

nodes.label: Gajakeshari Yoga
nodes.author: Maharshi Parasara
nodes.formation: Jupiter in angle (Kendra) from Ascendant or Moon, aspected by benefic, not debilitated/combust/inimical
nodes.effects: Splendorous, wealthy, intelligent, endowed with many virtues, favourite of the King

nodes.label: Amala Yoga
nodes.author: Maharshi Parasara
nodes.formation: 10th house from Ascendant or Moon occupied exclusively by benefics
nodes.effects: Enduring fame, honoured by King, abundant pleasures, charitable, helpful, pious, virtuous

nodes.label: Parvata Yoga
nodes.author: Maharshi Parasara
nodes.formation: 7th and 8th Houses empty or occupied by benefics only, AND angles occupied by benefics
nodes.effects: Fortunate, eloquent, charitable, learned, fond of mirth, splendorous, leader of city

nodes.label: Kahala Yoga
nodes.author: Maharshi Parasara
nodes.formation: 4th Lord and Jupiter in mutual angles with Ascendant Lord strong; OR 4th Lord in own/exaltation sign conjunct 10th Lord
nodes.effects: Energetic, courageous, crafty, chief of four armies, lord of villages

nodes.label: Chamara Yoga
nodes.author: Maharshi Parasara
nodes.formation: Ascendant Lord in exaltation in angle aspected by Jupiter; OR two benefics in Ascendant and 9th, or 10th and 7th
nodes.effects: King or honoured by King, long lived, scholarly, eloquent, well versed in all arts

nodes.label: Sankha Yoga
nodes.author: Maharshi Parasara
nodes.formation: Ascendant Lord strong AND 5th and 6th Lords in mutual angles; OR 9th Lord strong with Ascendant Lord and 10th Lord in movable signs
nodes.effects: Endowed with wealth, wife and sons, kindly nature, propitious, intelligent, virtuous, long-lived

nodes.label: Bheri Yoga
nodes.author: Maharshi Parasara
nodes.formation: 9th Lord strong AND all planets in 1st, 2nd, 7th and 12th Houses; OR Venus, Jupiter and Ascendant Lord in angles with 9th Lord strong
nodes.effects: Wealthy, endowed with wife and sons, King, famous, virtuous, good mannered, happy

nodes.label: Mridanga Yoga
nodes.author: Maharshi Parasara
nodes.formation: Ascendant Lord strong AND other planets in exaltation or own signs in angles or trines
nodes.effects: King or happy like a King

nodes.label: Shrinatha Yoga
nodes.author: Maharshi Parasara
nodes.formation: 7th Lord in exaltation in 10th House AND 10th Lord conjunct 9th Lord
nodes.effects: King equal to Indra, God of Gods

nodes.label: Sharada Yoga
nodes.author: Maharshi Parasara
nodes.formation: 10th Lord in 5th House with Mercury in angle and Sun in own sign; OR Jupiter/Mercury in trine from Moon with Mars in 11th
nodes.effects: Wealth, wife and sons, happy, scholarly, honoured by King, pious and virtuous

nodes.label: Matsya Yoga
nodes.author: Maharshi Parasara
nodes.formation: Benefics in 9th and Ascendant, mixed planets in 5th, malefics in 4th and 8th
nodes.effects: Astrologer, kindness incarnate, virtuous, intelligent, strong, beautiful, famous, learned, pious

nodes.label: Koorma Yoga
nodes.author: Maharshi Parasara
nodes.formation: 5th, 6th and 7th occupied by benefics in own/exaltation/friendly signs AND 3rd, 11th and Ascendant occupied by malefics in own/exaltation signs
nodes.effects: King, courageous, virtuous, famous, helpful, happy, leader of men

nodes.label: Khadaga Yoga
nodes.author: Maharshi Parasara
nodes.formation: 9th Lord in 2nd House, 2nd Lord in 9th House, Ascendant Lord in angle or trine
nodes.effects: Endowed with wealth, fortunes and happiness, learned, gifted with intelligence and strength, grateful and skillful

nodes.label: Lakshmi Yoga
nodes.author: Maharshi Parasara
nodes.formation: 9th Lord in own/exaltation/mooltrikona sign in angle, Ascendant Lord strong
nodes.effects: Charming, virtuous, King, many sons, abundant wealth, famous, high moral merits

nodes.label: Kusuma Yoga
nodes.author: Maharshi Parasara
nodes.formation: Movable sign in Ascendant, Venus in angle, Moon in trine with benefic, Saturn in 10th
nodes.effects: King or equal to King, charitable, enjoys pleasures, happy, prime in family, virtuous, man of letters

nodes.label: Kalanidhi Yoga
nodes.author: Maharshi Parasara
nodes.formation: Jupiter conjunct or aspected by Venus and Mercury in 2nd or 5th House; OR Jupiter in signs of Venus or Mercury
nodes.effects: Virtuous, honoured by King, free from disease, happy, endowed with wealth and learning

nodes.label: Kalpadruma (Parijata) Yoga
nodes.author: Maharshi Parasara
nodes.formation: Ascendant Lord, Lord of that sign, Lord of that sign's Lord, and Navamsha Lord — all in angles or trines or exaltation
nodes.effects: All kinds of wealth, King, pious, strong, fond of war, merciful

nodes.label: Maharaja Yoga
nodes.author: Maharshi Parasara
nodes.formation: Exchange between Ascendant Lord and 5th Lord AND Atmakaraka and Putrakaraka in Ascendant or 5th, in exaltation/Navamsha/own sign, aspected by benefic
nodes.effects: Famous, happy, and regal

nodes.label: Raja Yoga (Generic)
nodes.author: Maharshi Parasara
nodes.formation: Angular Lord (1/4/7/10) in relation with Trinal Lord (1/5/9) by conjunction, aspect, or exchange
nodes.effects: Royal status, power, authority, recognition

nodes.label: Raja Yoga — 9th and 10th Lord Conjunction
nodes.author: Maharshi Parasara
nodes.formation: 9th Lord and 10th Lord in conjunction
nodes.effects: Strongest Raja Yoga; native gets government post of very high level, material achievements, honour and fame

nodes.label: Raja Yoga — 4th and 5th Lord Conjunction
nodes.author: Maharshi Parasara
nodes.formation: 4th Lord and 5th Lord in conjunction
nodes.effects: Education, popularity, art, social understanding, property purchases, high government post

nodes.label: Raja Yoga — 4th and 9th Lord Conjunction
nodes.author: Maharshi Parasara
nodes.formation: 4th Lord and 9th Lord in conjunction
nodes.effects: God-loving, devoted, all pleasures and wealth without effort, famous, great public following

nodes.label: Viparita Raja Yoga (type)
nodes.author: Maharshi Parasara

nodes.effects: Rajayoga — power and recognition despite adversities

nodes.label: Adhi Yoga

nodes.effects: King or equal, intelligent, wealthy, famous, self-earned wealth

nodes.label: Anapha Yoga

nodes.effects: King, free from diseases, virtuous, famous, charming, every kind of happiness

nodes.effects: All pleasures, charitable, endowed with wealth and conveyances, excellent servants

nodes.effects: Disgraced, devoid of intelligence and learning, penury and calamities

nodes.label: Vosi Yoga

nodes.label: Jaimini Astrology System (Goel's Practical Framework)
nodes.author: V.P. Goel
nodes.description: Jaimini is a unique branch of astrology distinct from Parashar. Key differences: sign-based aspects (not planet-based); variable chara karakas (not fixed); signs synonymous with houses; dashas not moon-based; simple strength calculation; Karkamsha concept; Argala importance. Goel combines Jaimini with Parashar for double-checking predictions. Useful when birth time is inaccurate (lagna sign and chara karakas stable).

nodes.label: Jaimini Sign-Based Aspects
nodes.author: V.P. Goel
nodes.description: Aspects are through signs, not planets. Movable signs aspect fixed signs except the adjoining fixed sign. Fixed signs aspect movable signs except the adjoining movable sign. Common signs aspect other common signs. The aspect to the farthest sign is strongest (akin to 7th aspect of Parashar). Aspects are mutual.

nodes.label: Seven Chara Karakas (Goel's scheme)
nodes.author: V.P. Goel
nodes.significations: AK (soul/self/1st), Amk (career/2nd/10th, death-giver to spouse/self), BK (siblings/father/3rd/9th), MK (mother/4th, maraca for father), PK (children/intelligence/5th), GK (6th/8th/12th, trouble-maker), DK (spouse/7th, giver of death)
nodes.description: Seven karakas decided by longitude of planets (without sign) — seven planets except Rahu/Ketu. AK = highest longitude; DK = least longitude. Goel firmly uses 7 karakas (not 8), stating 8-karaka scheme is unnecessary with precise calculation in seconds.

nodes.label: Karaka Determination by Longitude
nodes.author: V.P. Goel
nodes.description: Karaka assigned by planet's longitude within a sign (without sign). Highest longitude = AK, then descending: Amk, BK, MK, PK, GK, DK (least longitude). Goel recommends using seconds or fraction-of-seconds precision to avoid ties. 8-karaka option is for rare same-longitude cases; Goel rejects this as impractical.

nodes.label: Pada (Arudha) Computation — Goel's Method
nodes.author: V.P. Goel
nodes.description: Count from the house to its lord; again count the same number from the lord. Resulting sign = Arudha of that house. Goel explicitly does NOT use classical exceptions (1st/7th house rule). Arudha of 1st = Lagna Arudha (paka lagna). Arudha of 12th = Upapada (used for all relations). Acknowledges strict longitudinal method exists but 'needs further research'.

nodes.label: Upapada (Arudha of 12th House)
nodes.author: V.P. Goel
nodes.description: The Arudha of the 12th house. Jaimini recommends use of upapada for all relations. Used prominently for marriage/partnership timing — examined in dasha signs, with 7th pada from dasha sign clinching marriage prediction.

nodes.label: Karkamsha Lagna (KL)
nodes.author: V.P. Goel
nodes.description: The sign occupied by Atmakaraka (AK) in navamsha, marked in the birth horoscope. Treated as the prime lagna, more important than lagna. Represents the real promise/inner quality. KL chart = birth chart planets with KL as lagna. Swamsha = same sign in navamsha chart.

nodes.label: Three-Lagna Image/Reality Distinction (Goel's Original)
nodes.author: V.P. Goel
nodes.description: Karkamsha Lagna = real inner quality (the promise with which you are born). Lagna = aspirations/desires of the person. Pada Lagna = reflection for outside world (image as perceived by others). Example: 2nd from KL strong = truly wealthy; 2nd from lagna strong = wants to be wealthy; 2nd from pada lagna strong = seen as wealthy. 'Any person if wealthy from pada lagna but poor from Karkamsha lagna then it is show business.' When Pada Lagna = Lagna, person is famous by outside world also.

nodes.label: House-Lord Dasha Prediction Rule (Goel's Primary Original Disclosure)
nodes.author: V.P. Goel
nodes.description: For any event in a dasha, the lord of the relevant house (counted from the dasha sign) must satisfy one of two conditions: (a) the lord IS the chara karaka of the event (e.g., 7th lord = DK for marriage), OR (b) the lord is aspecting the dasha sign or the house of the event. Goel states: 'This principle is disclosed for the first time in this book. It is an important tool which is not discussed by any author till date.' Discriminates when karaka-dasha relation alone is insufficient.
nodes.norm_label: house-lord dasha prediction rule (goel's primary original disclosure)

nodes.label: Karaka and Pada Sign Event Timing Rule
nodes.author: V.P. Goel
nodes.description: Events will happen in the sign of pada and the sign of the karaka. E.g., if Jupiter is DK, marriage events happen in Sagittarius or Pisces dasha (or Jupiter's exaltation/debilitation sign dasha). If Jupiter also relates to these signs, 'it is almost confirmed.' The 7th pada from dasha sign clinches the prediction.
nodes.norm_label: karaka and pada sign event timing rule

nodes.label: Jaimini Raj Yogas (14 listed by Goel)
nodes.author: V.P. Goel
nodes.description: 14 yogas: (1) Conjunction/mutual aspect among AK, Amk, PK, DK, 5th lord (10 combinations). (2) Moon-Venus conjunction/aspect. (3) Moon aspected by many planets = excellent yoga. (4) Same planet aspecting bhava lagna, hora lagna, ghatika lagna = raj yoga (status, money, king-like). (5) Same planet aspecting same house in D1, D3, D9 = prosperous. (6) Vaithanika yoga: Mars+Venus+Ketu in 3/11 from each other = success/fame. (7) Auspicious planets in 2/4/5 from Amk = high status. (8) Amk in 3/6 with Mars/Sun/Saturn/Rahu/Ketu = professional success. (9) Equal planets in lagna/4th = happiness. (10) More yogas in navamsha = success with less effort. (11) Amk in angles/trines/11th from AK = success with less effort. (12) Amk in trik from AK = success after hard work. (13) Afflicted karaka = trouble to its significations. (14) Benefic association/aspect on karaka = benefic results promised.
nodes.norm_label: jaimini raj yogas (14 listed by goel)

nodes.label: Graha Bala (Planetary Strength) — 5 Sources
nodes.author: V.P. Goel
nodes.description: Five sources: (1) Mooltrikona (status-based: exalted 60, own 30, friend's 22.5...). (2) Karaka (chara karaka role: AK 70, Amk 60, BK 50...). (3) Kendriya (placement from AK: Kendra 60, Panaphara 40, Apolikima 20). (4) Kartari (odd sign + Kartari = 60 units; even sign + Kartari = 0). (5) Adhipati (odd-sign lord + malefic association = 60; Moon excluded; Rahu/Ketu included).

nodes.label: Rashi Bala (Sign Strength) — 5 Sources
nodes.author: V.P. Goel
nodes.description: Permanent: common signs 60, fixed 30, movable 15. Temporary (4 sources): (1) Karaka (karaka occupying sign gives strength; AK 60... DK 15). (2) Sthana (more planets = stronger; 1 planet 30, 2 planets 45...). (3) Aspect (Jupiter/Mercury/lord aspecting or conjunct = 60 each; all three = 180). (4) Strength of lord (added to sign).

nodes.label: BVB Short Method for Strength (Goel's Simplification)
nodes.author: V.P. Goel
nodes.description: Simplified Graha Bala: 3 sources (Mooltrikonadi: exalted 70/mooltrikona 60/own 50/friend 40/neutral 30/debilitated 10; Amsha: AK 70...DK 10; Kendradi: from AK Kendra 60/Panaphara 40/Apolikima 20). Rahu/Ketu excluded. Simplified Rashi Bala: 4 sources (Chara: movable 20/fixed 40/dual 60; Sthira: 10 per planet; Dhristi: 60 per lord/Jupiter/Mercury aspect; Graha: lord's strength). Goel notes short vs. full method may give different Brahma.
nodes.norm_label: bvb short method for strength (goel's simplification)

nodes.label: Brahma (Creator) — Identification Method
nodes.author: V.P. Goel
nodes.description: Method 1: lord of 8th from AK if placed in 8th from AK = Brahma. Method 2 (if condition absent): (a) work out strength of lagna and 7th; (b) note lords of 6th, 8th, 12th from stronger of lagna/7th; (c) strongest of three = Brahma; (d) Saturn is EXCLUDED (if Saturn qualifies, pick next stronger). Brahma placement determines Sthira and Brahma dasha starting sign.

nodes.label: Maheswara and Rudra
nodes.author: V.P. Goel
nodes.description: Maheswara (Shiva, strongest Rudra): lord of 8th from AK. If exalted, also consider 12th lord from AK; stronger of two = Maheswara. Saturn CAN be Maheswara. Rudra: stronger of 8th/2nd lord from lagna; if weaker receives malefic aspect, it becomes Rudra. If stronger also receives malefic association/aspect, the stronger is Rudra. Used in death timing (NSD, Atmanadi).

nodes.label: Dwara Rashi and Bahya Rashi
nodes.author: V.P. Goel
nodes.description: Dwara Rashi = sign of dasha under consideration. Bahya Rashi = sign as far from Dwara Rashi as Dwara Rashi is from lagna. E.g., lagna Gemini, dasha Scorpio (6th from lagna) → 6th from Scorpio = Aries = bahya rashi. Used in Atmanadi dasha for death prediction (examine both signs' associations/aspects).

nodes.label: Vridhi Karaka Hora Lagna (VKHL)
nodes.author: V.P. Goel
nodes.description: Jaimini Hora Lagna used for longevity calculation (not for yoga). Method: (1) For day birth calculate Dinman, night birth calculate Ratriman. (2) Divide by 12 = one hora (Q1). (3) Find time interval from sunrise to birth. (4) Divide by Q1. (5) Quotient = completed hora signs. (6) Multiply decimal by 30 for degrees/minutes. (7) If bhava lagna odd, add to bhava lagna; if even, subtract. Differs from Parashar Hora Lagna.

nodes.label: Varnada Lagna Calculation
nodes.author: V.P. Goel
nodes.description: Calculated from birth lagna and Parashar hora lagna. (1) If birth lagna odd, count from Aries to lagna; if even, count from Pisces to lagna in reverse = A. (2) Similarly for hora lagna = B. (3) If both same (odd/even), A+B = C; if different, |A-B| = C. (4) Count C from Aries (odd lagna) or Pisces (even lagna) = Varnada lagna. Used for Varnada dasha. Extendable to all houses.

nodes.label: Argala Definition and Types
nodes.author: V.P. Goel
nodes.description: Argala = 'lock' (safe-keeping or preventing escape). Decides mutual relation of houses, signs, planets. Primary argala: planets in 4th, 2nd, 11th cause argala — obstructed by 10th, 12th, 3rd respectively. Secondary: 5th causes argala, 9th obstructs. Vipreet: 3+ malefics in 3rd = very favorable, NO counter. If argala-causing planets stronger (number/quality) than obstructing, argala prevails.

nodes.label: Quarter-Based Argala Obstruction (Goel's Specific Rule)
nodes.author: V.P. Goel
nodes.description: Argala caused by planet in 1st quarter (0°-7°30′) is obstructed by planet in 4th quarter (22°30′-30°) of obstructing sign. 2nd quarter (7°30′-15°) obstructed by 3rd quarter (15°-22°30′). And vice versa. Planet not in matching quarter does NOT obstruct. Refinement not explicit in classical sutras.

nodes.label: Nodes Counted in Reverse for Argala
nodes.author: V.P. Goel
nodes.description: The counting of Argala and obstruction is in reverse direction for Rahu and Ketu.
nodes.norm_label: nodes counted in reverse for argala

nodes.label: Argala Effects (BPHS-derived, applied by Goel)
nodes.author: V.P. Goel
nodes.effects: Argala on lagna/Arudha lagna/7th from them = famous and fortunate. Unobstructed argala + aspect on lagna = famous. Argala on 2nd = wealth/grains. 3rd argala = happiness from co-born. 5th argala = sons, grandsons, intelligence. Unobstructed argala on lagna, 5th, 9th = definitely famous and a king. Argala-causing planet = also house lord = effect many fold. Rahu/Ketu unobstructed argala = mystery to significations.
nodes.description: When unobstructed argala on lagna, Arudha lagna, and 7th from them → famous and fortunate. Malefic or benefic causing unobstructed argala and aspecting lagna → famous. Any house with unobstructed argala + aspect → enhanced signification. Argala on 2nd = wealth; 3rd = co-born happiness; 5th = sons/intelligence. Unobstructed argala on 1st, 5th, 9th = famous and king. Argala-causing planet = also house lord → effect many-fold. Rahu/Ketu unobstructed argala = mystery.

nodes.label: Argala on Houses — Extended Interpretation (Goel)
nodes.author: V.P. Goel
nodes.description: Beyond BPHS: consider relation of argala-causing planet to house lord and karaka. If planet inimical to house → harms; friendly → helps. Same applies to obstructing planet (exception: 3rd house special argala). Consider signification of house FROM WHICH argala is caused (e.g., 11th house argala = gain/loss to target).

nodes.label: Argala Application to Dasha Prediction
nodes.author: V.P. Goel
nodes.description: Argala is applicable to dasha prediction: make the running dasha sign the lagna and work out argala on houses and planets. Significations of planets depend on lordship, sthira karkatwa, AND chara karkatwa. Argala effects derived in dasha of sign or planets concerned.

nodes.label: Chara Dasha — 3 Calculation Methods
nodes.author: V.P. Goel
nodes.description: Most important Jaimini Rashi dasha ('like Vimshottari of Jaimini'). Method 1 (K.N. Rao/Vemuri Rama Murthy Shastri): starts from lagna; order based on 9th house sign (direct group: Aries/Taurus/Gemini/Libra/Scorpio/Sagittarius; indirect: Cancer/Leo/Virgo/Capricorn/Aquarius/Pisces); dasha years = count to lord minus 1; special dual-lordship for Scorpio (Mars+Ketu) and Aquarius (Saturn+Rahu). Method 2 (P.S. Shastri): adds exaltation +1yr/debilitation -1yr; prefers sign strength over degrees. Method 3 (Irangati Rangacharya): different for male/female; padakrama order; no deduction of one year. Universally applicable.

nodes.label: Chara Dasha Period Calculation Rules
nodes.author: V.P. Goel
nodes.description: Decide dasha sign's group (direct/indirect). For direct signs count directly to lord; for indirect count indirectly. Both signs included. Deduct one year. Lord in same sign = 12 years. Special for Scorpio (Mars+Ketu) and Aquarius (Saturn+Rahu): (a) if one co-lord in sign, count to other; (b) both in sign = 12 years; (c) both together elsewhere = count to that sign; (d) in different signs = count to stronger (more associations → higher degrees → minutes → seconds).

nodes.label: Chara Dasha Sub-Period Rules
nodes.author: V.P. Goel
nodes.description: Sub-periods = as many months as Maha dasha years. Maha dasha keeps LAST sub-period to itself (Method 1). Order of sub-periods = same as dasha order for the sign, but FIRST sub-period starts from 2nd sign in MD order (Method 1). For Method 2/3, MD keeps first sub-period.

nodes.label: Mandook Dasha — 6 Methods
nodes.author: V.P. Goel
nodes.description: 'Frog-jump' dasha. Method 1 (BVB/K.N. Rao): requires 4+ planets in Kendras (excl. Rahu/Ketu); starts from lagna (odd) or 7th (even). Method 2 (P.S. Shastri/BPHS): universal; stronger of lagna/7th; fixed periods 7/8/9 yrs. Method 3 (Sanjay Rath/Updesha Sutras): starts from odd sign of lagna or adarsh sign; every 3rd sign. Method 4 (Irangati Rangacharya): padakrama from stronger of lagna/7th (male) or lagna/4th (female). Method 5 (Labh Mandook): on Ekadashamsha; ayur dasha of war/destruction. Method 6: trine groups, gender-specific. Methods 1 & 2 validated; others 'vague' but included.

nodes.label: Sthira Dasha
nodes.author: V.P. Goel
nodes.description: For misfortunes, death, miseries but usable for all events. Starts from sign occupied by Brahma. Always direct order. Fixed periods: 7 (movable), 8 (fixed), 9 (dual) years. Sub-periods: as many months as MD years; MD keeps first sub; follows direct order. Requires Graha/Rashi Bala calculation (short BVB or full Jaimini method).

nodes.label: Brahma Dasha (Irangati Rangacharya method)
nodes.author: V.P. Goel
nodes.description: For longevity/death timing. Brahma in odd sign → dasha starts from that sign, direct order. Brahma in even sign → starts from 7th from it, indirect order. Dasha years = count from sign to 6th lord (direct for odd, reverse for even). 12 years if 6th lord in sign or 12th in counting order. Sub-periods: as many months as MD years; first sub = MD sign. Goel concludes: 'Brahma dasha is useful for indicating the time of death.'

nodes.label: Narayan Dasha
nodes.author: V.P. Goel
nodes.description: Important predictive dasha, universally applicable. Starts from stronger of lagna/7th. Order based on 9th house (direct/indirect groups). Sequence: movable=regular, fixed=6th sign jumps, dual=5th sign (trine) jumps. Dasha years = count to lord minus 1. Special dual-lordship for Scorpio/Aquarius. Sub-periods: first sub = sign occupied by MD lord; order follows Narayan dasha order.

nodes.label: Navamsha Dasha — 3 Methods
nodes.author: V.P. Goel
nodes.description: Confirmation tool for results from other dashas. Method 1: on navamsha chart; starts from navamsha lagna (odd) or 7th (even); always direct. Method 2: navamsha chart; single lordship (Ketu rules Scorpio, Rahu rules Aquarius). Method 3 (Updesha Sutras): birth chart; adarsh sign for even lagna; fixed 9-year periods; always direct. Used prominently for marriage timing.

nodes.label: Navamsha Dasha Marriage Timing Rule
nodes.author: V.P. Goel
nodes.description: Take running dasha as lagna. 7th house and/or 7th lord from dasha should relate to DK. If also relates to PK → marriage of choice OR children born early. The lord of house from running dasha is important (often ignored). Method 1 (navamsha chart only) gives best marriage timing results.

nodes.label: Narayan Shoola Dasha (NSD) — For Longevity
nodes.author: V.P. Goel
nodes.description: Nirayana Shoola Dasha for longevity. Starts from stronger of lagna/7th. Always direct order. Each dasha = 9 years (total 108 = full lifespan). 12 sub-periods of 9 months each; first sub = MD, then direct. Examined in BOTH birth chart and Varanasi Trimshamsha (D30).

nodes.label: NSD Fatal Period Identification Rules (10 observations)
nodes.author: V.P. Goel
nodes.effects: (1) Benefic/lord association with dasha = protection, no death. (2) Saturn relation with dasha = fatal blow. (3) Rahu/Ketu in 6/8/12 from dasha. (4) Conditions 2&3 mutual (if Rahu/Ketu in dasha, Saturn in 6/8/12). (5) Mars with dasha (esp. sub) = sudden end (accident/war); Trimshamsha malefic = painful death, benefic = painless. (6) Trimshamsha confirmation (rules 2&3) = death after problems. (7) Birth chart confirmation = normal death without agony; benefic improves. (8) Rudra/Maheswara relation to dasha = special attention; Rudra in trine from dasha. (9) Reconfirm in birth chart. (10) Maracas = planets in 2/7, lords of 2/7, signs in 2/7 (extend to Trimshamsha).
nodes.description: 10 practical observations for identifying fatal period: (1) Strong benefic or lord association = protection. (2) Saturn relation delivers fatal blow. (3) Rahu/Ketu in 6/8/12 from dasha. (4) Conditions 2&3 are mutual. (5) Mars association (esp. sub) = sudden end (accident/war). (6) Trimshamsha confirmation = death after problems. (7) Birth chart confirmation = normal death. (8) Rudra/Maheswara relation needs attention. (9) Reconfirm in birth chart. (10) Maracas = 2nd/7th planets, lords, signs.
nodes.norm_label: nsd fatal period identification rules (10 observations)

nodes.label: Varanasi Trimshamsha (D30)
nodes.author: V.P. Goel
nodes.description: Thirtieth division (each 1-degree). For odd signs first Trimshamsha falls in Aries; for even signs starts from Libra. Other divisions counted clockwise. Used for miseries, misfortunes, and death confirmation in NSD. When fatal conditions confirmed here → death 'after some problems'; confirmed in birth chart → 'normal death without agony'.

nodes.label: Trikon Dasha — 3 Methods
nodes.author: V.P. Goel
nodes.description: Trines (1/5/9) = Lakshmi sthana / dharma trines. Method 1 (BVB, similar to B.V. Raman): starts from strongest trine sign; moves in trine groups; order based on 9th house. Method 2 (Irangati Rangacharya/Vriddha Karika): gender-specific; frontal (sammukha) sign for even strongest; padakrama. Method 3 (Jagannath Hora): direct/indirect based on starting sign odd/even. Special: 7th lord = 10 years; exalted +1yr; debilitated -1yr. Best for timing achievements.

nodes.label: Atmanadi Dasha (Hora Dasha) — For Death Timing
nodes.author: V.P. Goel
nodes.description: Irangati Rangacharya method for timing of death. Also called Hora dasha. Always starts from lagna. Direct order for odd lagna, indirect for even. Dasha years = count to lord (direct for odd sign, reverse for even); 12 years if lord in sign or 12th in counting; 10 years if lord in 7th. Sub-periods: MD keeps first sub; follows MD sequence. Examination: MD = dwara rashi (examine lord); bahya rashi examined; bad if malefic-aspected, malefics in Kendra, or DK involved.
nodes.norm_label: atmanadi dasha (hora dasha) — for death timing

nodes.label: Amk Placement as Effort Indicator
nodes.author: V.P. Goel
nodes.description: Amk in angles, trines, or 11th from AK (in birth chart OR navamsha) → success with less effort. Amk in trik houses (6/8/12) from AK → success after hard work. Also true in navamsha. Amk in 3rd/6th with Mars/Sun/Saturn/Rahu/Ketu (or aspected by them) → professional success.

nodes.label: Raj Yoga via Bhava/Hora/Ghatika Lagna Single Aspect
nodes.author: V.P. Goel
nodes.description: If same planet aspects bhava lagna, hora lagna, AND ghatika lagna → raj yoga. The person has status, money, and lives like a king.
nodes.norm_label: raj yoga via bhava/hora/ghatika lagna single aspect

nodes.label: Vaithanika Yoga
nodes.author: V.P. Goel
nodes.description: When Mars, Venus, and Ketu are in 3rd/11th from each other and mutually aspect → gives success and fame.

nodes.label: Navamsha Yoga Multiplication Rule
nodes.author: V.P. Goel
nodes.description: Check yogas in navamsha also. If number of yogas increases in navamsha → success and desired results without much effort.

nodes.label: Trikona Jump is Essential to Trikon Dasha
nodes.author: V.P. Goel
nodes.description: The trikona jump (moving in trine groups of 3 signs) is what distinguishes Trikon dasha from Chara dasha. 'If it were to be same as chara dasha then it will not be mentioned by sages.' Method 1 (which uses the jump) is preferred.
nodes.norm_label: trikona jump is essential to trikon dasha

nodes.label: Example: Queen Elizabeth II — House-Lord Rule
nodes.author: V.P. Goel
nodes.description: DOB 21 Apr 1926, 02:48, London. Sister born 1930 (Scorpio/Aquarius): 3rd lord from Scorpio = Saturn, placed in Scorpio (aspects dasha); 3rd pada in Scorpio; BK in Aquarius. Marriage 1947 (Cancer/Aries): 7th lord from Cancer = Saturn, aspects Cancer; 7th pada in Cancer; Saturn also DK (double confirmation). Charles 1948 (Cancer/Pisces): 5th lord from Cancer = Mars, aspects 5th from Cancer; PK in Pisces. Queen 1952 (Cancer): 9th/10th lords from Cancer conjoined, and are AK+Amk. Demonstrates house-lord rule consistently.
nodes.norm_label: example: queen elizabeth ii — house-lord rule

nodes.label: Example: Indira Gandhi — Full Argala Analysis
nodes.author: V.P. Goel
nodes.description: DOB 19 Nov 1917, Allahabad. House-by-house argala analysis. Lagna: unobstructed argala from Jupiter (11th) + Sun/Mercury (5th), all aspecting → 'famous and king.' 7th: unobstructed argala from retrograde Jupiter, Sun, Mercury → abundant wealth, fame, marital happiness. 8th: unobstructed argala from Venus/Rahu and Ketu → sudden end, medium lifespan. On planets: Sun (father) gets argala from Venus/Rahu (6th) → father died in Scorpio dasha. Mars gets argala from Venus/Rahu/Ketu (2nd) → Leo dasha 1983-1992, she and Rajiv killed; 'Mars is violent.'
nodes.norm_label: example: indira gandhi — full argala analysis

nodes.label: Example: Indira Gandhi Death — Multi-Dasha Confirmation
nodes.author: V.P. Goel
nodes.description: Death 31 Oct 1984. Chara dasha Leo/Libra (Method 1): Leo maraca, argala from 8th pada Venus+Rahu, aspected by GK Moon+DK Sun. Narayan dasha Pisces: aspected by Rahu/Ketu, Mars in 8th aspected by GK. NSD Leo/Capricorn: MD in 2nd with Mars, AD in 7th with Moon aspected by Mars; Trimshamsha confirms; maracas Leo/Capricorn, Sun/Saturn, Mars/Moon. Demonstrates multi-dasha cross-validation.
nodes.norm_label: example: indira gandhi death — multi-dasha confirmation

nodes.label: Example: Accident Case — Argala on 6th House
nodes.author: V.P. Goel
nodes.description: DOB 30 Apr 1945, 09:15, Delhi. Serious road accident Sept 1972, bed 6 months. 6th house gets unobstructed argala from Ketu, Venus, Mercury, Mars. From KL (Aquarius), 6th house is Cancer → argala from Moon. Dasha was Aries: gets argala from Saturn (GK, lord of 8th from lagna, 12th from KL) and Rahu. Shows argala on 6th = accident/illness.
nodes.norm_label: example: accident case — argala on 6th house

nodes.label: Example: Barack Obama — Argala for Position
nodes.author: V.P. Goel
nodes.description: DOB 4 Aug 1961, 19:24, Honolulu. Two-term US President. Lagna + 7th house get unobstructed argala AND aspect from Moon → fame and position combination. KL (Sagittarius) gets unobstructed argala from Jupiter (its lord). Chara dasha of Capricorn.
nodes.norm_label: example: barack obama — argala for position

nodes.label: Example: Harivanshrai Bachchan — Longevity via Argala
nodes.author: V.P. Goel
nodes.description: DOB 27 Nov 1907, 05:24, Allahabad. Lived till 18 Jan 2003. 8th house gets unobstructed argala from exalted Jupiter + Moon (both strong). KL (Pisces): 8th from KL (Libra) gets unobstructed argala from Sun+Venus; 8th lord Venus gets argala from Mars+Saturn. Marriage: 7th from lagna argala from Rahu obstructed by Mars+Saturn; 7th from KL (Virgo) argala from Sun+Venus countered by strong Jupiter+Moon → first wife died, married again.
nodes.norm_label: example: harivanshrai bachchan — longevity via argala

nodes.label: Example: Swami Vivekananda — Sthira & Brahma Dasha
nodes.author: V.P. Goel
nodes.description: DOB 12 Jan 1863, 06:09, Calcutta. Moon (Amk, associated with 2 planets) = Brahma. Sthira from Virgo. Chicago lecture Sep 1893: Sagittarius/Leo — Sagittarius = lagna+KL; Amk in 10th with Saturn; two benefics in 2nd house of speech cause argala to Sagittarius; Leo = 9th house aspected by three benefics. Death 4 July 1902: Capricorn/Sagittarius — Capricorn 2nd from KL, aspected by Rahu/Ketu; Ketu malefic argala; Sagittarius = KL aspected by Amk; DK in 11th.
nodes.norm_label: example: swami vivekananda — sthira & brahma dasha

nodes.label: Example: Vladimir Putin — Narayan Dasha for PM Rise
nodes.author: V.P. Goel
nodes.description: DOB 7 Oct 1952, St. Petersburg. First PM 1999. 7th house stronger than lagna → dasha from Taurus. Capricorn dasha (1999): from Capricorn 9th/10th lords conjoined; Capricorn gets argala from exalted Moon. Sub Virgo: has Amk and natal 10th lord; 9th/10th lords from Virgo conjoined. Rise to power clearly seen.
nodes.norm_label: example: vladimir putin — narayan dasha for pm rise

nodes.label: Example: Narendra Modi — Navamsha Dasha for PM
nodes.author: V.P. Goel
nodes.description: DOB 17 Sep 1950, 12:09, Vadnagar. PM 26 May 2014. Promise: vargottam Amk Venus in 10th (birth + navamsha); 9th lord + lagna lord conjoined in lagna. Method 1 (Sagittarius/Pisces): Sagittarius aspected by birth 10th lord Mercury (also GK); 11th from Pisces/Sagittarius aspected by Amk Venus+Saturn. Method 2 (Scorpio/Virgo): Amk Venus in 10th from Scorpio in both charts.
nodes.norm_label: example: narendra modi — navamsha dasha for pm

nodes.label: Example: Female Lottery Winner — Trikon Dasha for Windfall
nodes.author: V.P. Goel
nodes.description: Won $35M on 26 Oct 1996. Method 1 (Gemini/Pisces) clearest: 11th from Gemini = Aries with exalted Sun (PK); Aries aspected by Saturn/Mars/Venus/Jupiter → 11th super strong with raj yogas. Pisces (sub) aspected by MK/AK/DK; 11th from Pisces (Capricorn) aspected by Saturn; Mars+Saturn in 5th of speculation. Windfall clearly seen.
nodes.norm_label: example: female lottery winner — trikon dasha for windfall

nodes.label: Example: Rajesh Khanna — Marriage via Chara & Navamsha Dasha
nodes.author: V.P. Goel
nodes.description: DOB 29 Dec 1942, 18:05, Burewala. Marriage March 1973. Chara Method 1 (Aquarius/Taurus): Aquarius gets unobstructed argala from 7th pada Sun/Venus/Mercury; 7th lord from Aquarius in 7th house; Taurus has DK with argala from birth 7th lord Jupiter. Chara Method 3 (Cancer/Scorpio): Cancer aspected by DK; 7th lord from Cancer IS DK; Scorpio gets argala from Venus; DK in 7th from Scorpio. Navamsha (Leo/Taurus): 7th lord from Leo is DK; Taurus has DK; 7th from Taurus has PK.
nodes.norm_label: example: rajesh khanna — marriage via chara & navamsha dasha

nodes.label: Example: Charan Singh — Multi-Dasha Death Confirmation
nodes.author: V.P. Goel

Execution 30 Dec 2006 (Narayan Capricorn/Pisces: Capricorn has GK, aspected by DK/Rahu/Ketu/Mars; 8th from Pisces aspected by DK+Ketu. Atmanadi Pisces: lord Jupiter debilitated in 8th, aspected by Rahu/Ketu/Mars/Mercury=DK; Scorpio bahya with Mars/Ketu/Moon).

nodes.label: Yogini Dasha System (Goel)
nodes.author: V.P. Goel
nodes.description: Eight-fold nakshatra dasha of total 36 years (Mangala..Sankata, 1..8 years). Goel's progression method uses the nakshatra contributing the running Yogini as the Progressed Lagna and the Vimshottari nakshatra lord as the predictive key.

nodes.label: Mangala Yogini
nodes.author: V.P. Goel
nodes.effects: Short Moon-ruled period: mother, mind, love, 4th-house, travel, fluctuation. Nakshatras: Ardra, Chitra, Shravana.
nodes.description: First Yogini in the cycle, 1 year duration, ruled by Moon.

nodes.label: Pingala Yogini
nodes.author: V.P. Goel
nodes.effects: Sun-ruled: father, authority, career, government, health. Nakshatras: Punarvasu, Dhanishta, Swati.
nodes.description: Second Yogini, 2 years, ruled by Sun.

nodes.label: Dhanya Yogini
nodes.author: V.P. Goel
nodes.effects: Jupiter-ruled: wisdom, wealth, children, marriage, dharmic rise. Pushya sub-period gives lifelong-effect events. Nakshatras: Pushya, Vishakha, Shatbhishaj.
nodes.description: Third Yogini, 3 years, ruled by Jupiter.

nodes.label: Bhramari Yogini
nodes.author: V.P. Goel
nodes.effects: Mars-ruled: energy, conflict, surgery, assassination, property, abrupt events; often Maraka. Nakshatras: Ashlesha, Anuradha, P.Bhadrapad (+ Ashwini clubbed).
nodes.description: Fourth Yogini, 4 years, ruled by Mars.

nodes.label: Bhadrika Yogini
nodes.author: V.P. Goel
nodes.effects: Mercury-ruled: intellect, communication, business, education, elections, litigation, partnership. Nakshatras: Magha, Jyeshtha, U.Bhadrapad (+ Bharani clubbed).
nodes.description: Fifth Yogini, 5 years, ruled by Mercury.

nodes.label: Ulka Yogini
nodes.author: V.P. Goel
nodes.effects: Saturn-ruled: long struggle, sorrow, endurance, death, structural change, foreign. Nakshatras: P.Phalguni, Moola, Revati (+ Krittika clubbed).
nodes.description: Sixth Yogini, 6 years, ruled by Saturn.

nodes.label: Siddha Yogini
nodes.author: V.P. Goel
nodes.effects: Venus-ruled: marriage, comfort, vehicles, women, political power, arts. Nakshatras: Rohini, P.Ashadha, U.Phalguni.
nodes.description: Seventh Yogini, 7 years, ruled by Venus.

nodes.label: Sankata Yogini
nodes.author: V.P. Goel
nodes.effects: Longest, most turbulent: sudden/karmic/hidden events, death, intrigue, foreign, endings. Ketu additionally considered. Nakshatras: Hasta, Mrigshira, U.Ashadha.
nodes.description: Eighth Yogini, 8 years, ruled by Rahu (Ketu also considered).

nodes.label: Progressed Lagna (Goel)
nodes.author: V.P. Goel
nodes.description: The sign containing the nakshatra contributing the running Yogini becomes the Lagna for that dasha duration; all planets keep natal positions. For dwipada/tripada nakshatras the Lagna changes mid-period (rule of three).

nodes.label: Star (Nakshatra) Lord as Predictive Key
nodes.author: V.P. Goel
nodes.description: Although the Yogini has its own lord, predictions are delineated with reference to the nakshatra (star) lord using Vimshottari nakshatra lords. This is the key to Yogini analysis.

nodes.label: Three-cycle Nakshatra Progression
nodes.author: V.P. Goel
nodes.description: After the first 36-year cycle, the nakshatra contributing each Yogini advances by 8 positions in zodiacal order (skipping Ashwini, Bharani, Krittika which are clubbed). Mirrors Jaimini's Chara Dasha and prevents mechanical repetition of readings.

nodes.label: Clubbing of Ashwini/Bharani/Krittika
nodes.author: V.P. Goel
nodes.description: 24 nakshatras fit 3 cycles of 8 Yoginis. Ashwini, Bharani, Krittika are clubbed with Poorva Bhadrapada, Uttara Bhadrapada, Revati respectively because both raw and clubbed nakshatras yield the same Yogini (by the +3 / 8 formula) and share navamsha signs.

nodes.label: Dwipada/Tripada Lagna Change
nodes.author: V.P. Goel
nodes.description: When the nakshatra contributing the Yogini spans two signs (dwipada) or three (tripada), the Progressed Lagna changes mid-period. The change occurs in the sub-period proportional to the nakshatra's longitude in each sign (rule of three).

nodes.label: Yogini in Divisional Charts
nodes.author: V.P. Goel
nodes.description: The star lord of the running Yogini is examined in the corresponding divisional chart (D3 courage, D4 property, D7 children, D9 spouse, D10 profession, D12 parents), making the Progressed Lagna the divisional Lagna.

nodes.label: Double Transit (Saturn + Jupiter) on Progressed References
nodes.author: V.P. Goel
nodes.description: Transits are applied from two progressed reference points: Progressed Lagna and the star lord's position. Saturn aspects the relevant house/lord within 1 year, Jupiter within 6 months, Sun within 1 month, Moon within 3 days. Cites BPHS 3.6.
nodes.norm_label: double transit (saturn + jupiter) on progressed references

nodes.label: Yogini Dasha Computation Formula
nodes.author: V.P. Goel
nodes.description: Count Moon's nakshatra from Ashwini (=1). Add 3. Divide by 8. The remainder (1-8, with 0 treated as 8) is the Sr.No. of the operating Yogini. Abhijit is not counted.

nodes.label: Balance of Dasha at Birth
nodes.author: V.P. Goel
nodes.description: Full dasha spans one nakshatra (13 deg 20 min). Balance at birth = (remaining degrees of Moon in nakshatra / 13 deg 20 min) × full dasha period of the starting Yogini.

nodes.label: Sub-period (Antardasha) Formula
nodes.author: V.P. Goel
nodes.description: Each major period divides into 8 sub-periods in Mangala..Sankata order, beginning with the major lord itself. Duration proportional to each Yogini's major period. Formula: Sub-period days = (years of major Q) × (years of sub P) × 10. Symmetric in P and Q.

nodes.label: Three Reference Points for Analysis
nodes.author: V.P. Goel
nodes.description: Judge (1) nakshatra lord in birth chart, (2) nakshatra lord in progress chart, (3) relation of dasha lord from the nakshatra lord in the progress chart.

nodes.label: Nakshatra Lord Sub-period Fulfils Promise
nodes.author: V.P. Goel
nodes.description: In any major dasha, the sub-period of the nakshatra (star) lord generally fulfils the promise of that dasha.

nodes.label: Dual-Influence & Override Planets
nodes.author: V.P. Goel
nodes.description: A planet influenced by BOTH dasha and nakshatra lords is potent to deliver in its own sub-period. A planet INFLUENCING both dasha and nakshatra lords overrides the indications of that period.

nodes.label: Eleventh House of Expansion
nodes.author: V.P. Goel
nodes.description: The 11th lord and planets in 11th are important. Watch the birth 11th becoming Progressed Lagna, or the birth Lagna falling in the progress 11th — these periods are significant. Placement of birth Lagna in progress chart indicates the type of result.

nodes.label: Rahu/Ketu Act as Dispositor + Conjunct Planet
nodes.author: V.P. Goel
nodes.description: When Rahu or Ketu is the nakshatra lord, they act as (and are read as) their dispositor and any planet conjunct with them.
nodes.norm_label: rahu/ketu act as dispositor + conjunct planet

nodes.label: Ketu Considered Throughout Sankata
nodes.author: V.P. Goel
nodes.description: For Sankata dasha, Ketu is considered in addition to Rahu throughout the 8-year period.

nodes.label: Saturn Transit Window (1 year)
nodes.author: V.P. Goel
nodes.description: Saturn in transit will conjunct/aspect the concerned house or lord (from Progressed Lagna or star lord) within 1 year of the event.

nodes.label: Jupiter Transit Window (6 months)
nodes.author: V.P. Goel
nodes.description: Jupiter in transit will conjunct/aspect the concerned house or lord (from Progressed Lagna or star lord) within 6 months of the event.

nodes.label: Sun Transit Window (1 month)
nodes.author: V.P. Goel
nodes.description: Sun in transit will conjunct/aspect the concerned house or lord within 1 month of the event; the nakshatra lord is included in the Sun-transit judgement.

nodes.label: Moon Transit Window (3 days)
nodes.author: V.P. Goel
nodes.description: Moon in transit connects the concerned house/lord points within 3 days of the event — used for final pinpointing.

nodes.label: Yogini as Micro Vimshottari
nodes.author: V.P. Goel
nodes.description: One 36-year Yogini cycle is roughly one-third of Vimshottari's 120 years; all 27 nakshatras together contribute ~123 years of Yogini (3+ cycles). Yogini uses Vimshottari nakshatra lords as its predictive key. Robust to slight birth-time errors.

nodes.label: Progression Solves the 36-Year Riddle
nodes.author: V.P. Goel
nodes.description: The prejudice against Yogini Dasha (mechanical repetition of the 36-year cycle) is solved by progressing the starting nakshatra across cycles, mirroring Jaimini's Chara Dasha. Each cycle gets a different Progressed Lagna and a different nakshatra lord.

nodes.label: Example: Chitra-born Three-Cycle Progression
nodes.author: V.P. Goel
nodes.description: Chitra-born: Cycle 1 = Mangla/Chitra...Sankata/U.Ashadha; Cycle 2 = Mangla/Shravan...Sankata/Mrigshira; Cycle 3 = Mangla/Ardra...Sankata/Hasta. Same Yogini gives different results across cycles because the nakshatra (and Progressed Lagna) differs.

nodes.label: Example: Indira Gandhi (EC 6 / EC 17)
nodes.author: V.P. Goel
nodes.description: PM 1966 in Bhramari/Ashlesha; Bangladesh 1971 + election loss 1977 in Ulka/P.Phalguni; return as PM 1980 in Siddha/U.Phalguni; assassination 1984 in Sankata/Hasta. Flagship demonstration of the method across multiple Yoginis and transits.

nodes.label: Example: Queen Elizabeth II (EC 14)
nodes.author: V.P. Goel
nodes.description: Crowned in Dhanya/Ulka: Saturn as 9th/10th lord of birth, 7th lord in progress; star and dasha lords exchange houses. 8th-house connection gave status with tragedy.

nodes.label: Example: Classroom Case 1 — Steel Mill & Wife's Suicide
nodes.author: V.P. Goel
nodes.description: DOB 22 Aug 1954, Calcutta. Jan 1983 (Siddha/U.Phalguni, Leo lagna, Sun+Mercury dhana yoga): predicted and verified wealth via steel rolling mill in Houston. Jan 1995 (Sankata/Hasta, birth Lagna in 7th, Lagna lord in 12th, Jupiter afflicted): wife's suicide — blind test passed.
nodes.norm_label: example: classroom case 1 — steel mill & wife's suicide

nodes.label: Example: Classroom Case 2 — Child's Fall
nodes.author: V.P. Goel
nodes.description: DOB 20 Jun 1956, Chennai. Dec 1974 (Siddha/P.Ashadha): Venus retrograde+combust in 7th, lord of 6th/11th (maraka for child); Jupiter and Sun are marakas for child. Predicted child/intelligence suffering; one-year-old child fell from dining chair and died in Siddha/Dhanya.

nodes.label: Example: Classroom Case 3 — Krishan Kant's Death (5-chart verification)
nodes.author: V.P. Goel
nodes.description: VP Krishan Kant died 27 Jul 2002. Verified across 5 charts: Krishan Kant (Sankata/Hasta, died in Sankata/Siddha/Bhadrika), Suman Kant (Dhanya/Pushya, died in Dhanya/Bhadrika/Ulka), Deepti (Ulka/P.Phalguni), Rashmikant (Bhadrika/Magha, Ketu acts as afflicted Venus), Sukant (Siddha/Rohini, Moon in 8th as maraka). Each confirmed in Dwadamsha.
nodes.norm_label: example: classroom case 3 — krishan kant's death (5-chart verification)
